description: This file defines a Config class used for managing configuration objects within the Bootstrap framework. It includes methods for retrieving default configurations, merging configurations with data attributes, and type checking configuration options. The file also exports the Config class for use in other parts of the project.

classes.name: Config
classes.description: A class providing utility methods for managing component configurations, including default values, type validation, and merging data attributes.

methods.name: DefaultType
methods.description: Returns the default types for configuration options.

methods.name: NAME
methods.description: A static getter that should be implemented in subclasses to return the component's name.

methods.name: _getConfig
methods.description: Retrieves and processes the configuration object, including merging and type checking.

methods.name: _configAfterMerge
methods.description: Hook for processing configuration after merging; returns the config as-is by default.

methods.name: _mergeConfigObj
methods.description: Merges default configuration, data attributes, and provided config into a single configuration object.

methods.name: _typeCheckConfig
methods.description: Validates the types of configuration options against expected types.
